files._comment: Only show the editable template (sample_dbim, L448-470). All other hint code is hidden; agent learns allowed APIs only from the baseline variants (dbim/dbim_high_order/ddbm/ecsi).

edit._comment: Body only (interior between signature and next function). pre_edit shifts +9 lines, so [450,461] live-shifts to [459,470] — strictly the template body. Signature lines L448-458 and downstream functions stay protected so agents can't accidentally clobber the next def's signature (which previously caused 'unmatched )' SyntaxErrors).
